# Enhanced Webview Feature

> Single-feature repository for a banking enhanced webview.
> Built with Lit + Lion web components, deployed inside a native mobile app's webview.

## Architecture

- [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md): Full folder structure, decision trees, conventions

## Type Strategy

- Code files: `.js` (JavaScript)
- Type definitions: `types.ts` (TypeScript interfaces, consumed via JSDoc)
- Pattern: `@type {import('./types').SomeType}` in JS files

## Registration Pattern

- `[name].component.js` — class definition (no side effects)
- `[name].js` — calls `customElements.define()` (side effect)
- `src/app/registry.js` — central registration + dev-mode validation

## Key Files

- `src/app/feature-flow.js` — entry point, orchestrates screens
- `src/app/flow-config.js` — router configuration (screens, transitions)
- `src/app/registry.js` — component registry + validation
- `src/services/feature-api.js` — all API calls
- `src/bridge/native-args.js` — native app argument parsing
- `mocks/handlers.js` — MSW mock handlers

## Conventions

- [CONVENTIONS.md](.ai/CONVENTIONS.md): Naming, placement, rules
- Fixtures live next to any component with 2+ data states
- Tests import from `.component.js` (no side effects)
- No template separation — extract sub-components instead
